title: androsace alpina
intro: Androsace alpina, also known as the Alpine Five-spur, is a perennial alpine plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its alkaloid and terpene content. The health benefits of Androsace alpina include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in relieving symptoms of conditions such as gastritis and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Androsace alpina can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
